{{Infobox construct
| name = Abyssal Palace collection towers
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Abyssal Palace]] has collection towers erected over the homes of Sky’s Edge.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24">''Wintersteel'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Abyssal Palace collection towers]] are scripted to prevent spiritual detection.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Abyssal Palace collection towers]] are intended to collect [[Dreadgod madra]] for their sect.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
